title: Back on the road, no more horrible screeching sound :)

title: Oh my god - Salmon Glacier viewpoint !!!

arrival: Granduc Rd, Stewart, BC V0T 1W0, Canada

description: Or is it Aeroplane lake !? (if we believe the local sign)

title: Disperse Camping near Good Hope Lake
description: Super nice spot, 3 distinct zone to camp, meet some moto camper  who took the north site. Took out the motorcycle and the Kayaks ! No luck fishing though. Lots of dry dead wood to build a nice camp fire!

title: Super early departure towards Chilkoot river
description: Decided to not got to Skagway (because no Ferries on Monday !?) and take the long drive around through White Horse to Haines.
arrival: 90343 Alaska Hwy, Whitehorse, YT Y1A 7A1, Canada

description: The Yukon Motorcycle Park Inc.'s Restaurant
dining_address: 90343 Alaska Hwy, Whitehorse, YT Y1A 7A1, Canada

arrival: Salmon Run RV Campground, Haines, AK

title: Chilkoot River Campground
description: Famous place to see wildlife (Bear & Eagle) feast on Salmon going up to their native river. Didn't see any bears :( But fished our first fish (and baby salmon) with a fly fishing rod! Spend the day at the Chilbkoot rec site dishing, kayaking, nice dinner on the fire pit next to the lake. Sunk the drone in the lake though :(
sleeping_address: Salmon Run RV Campground, Haines, AK

title: Laundry !
